seed_problem: Pack polyominoes into a WxH board maximizing covered area (score = 1e5*sum(k)/(W*H)), reflections allowed; checker validates no-overlap and in-bounds.
mutation: composite: (goal) area -> weighted conservation value of covered cells, and (input) add a per-cell value field plus per-type LIMITED supply counts, turning pure area packing into a bounded weighted polyomino knapsack where value-density placement decisions dominate.
title: Wildlife Corridor Reserve: Habitat Patch Packing
strategies: reference / trivial: reading-order fill with the 2x2 square only (baseline B)
area greedy: reading-order fill using all patch types (more area, value-blind)
value-density greedy: rank every (type,orientation,offset) candidate by covered value and place first-fit under supply/overlap constraints
local search / restarts: seed with a constructive fill then swap/relocate patches toward high-value clusters
